India VCS Carbon Project Explorer

by Shubham Love  ·  Beta
Data sources: Berkeley Carbon Trading Project (BCTP) database and Verra VCS Registry API. Spatial data processed and aggregated by Shubham Love.

Terms of use: This dashboard and the underlying data pipeline are provided for research and informational purposes. If you use or reference this data, please attribute it as: "Shubham Love, India VCS Carbon Project Explorer, haevyre.com". Redistribution or commercial use of the compiled dataset without permission is not permitted.

Beta notice: This tool is under active development. Some project coordinates and attributes may be incomplete or reflect registry data as of April 2026.
Data: BCTP · Verra Registry  ·  haevyre.com
